name: harbor
title: Harbor Blvd (Fullerton → Santa Ana)
anchor_note: Corridor-consistent: current 43+543 route totals 9,500-11,000 (Harbor TSP study: '>10,000, 8% of OCTA riders'; OCTA ~117k/wkdy 2024) x [543 share 0.25-0.35 counts fully + Route 43 x corridor share 0.75 (LODES) - 0.86 (ACS transit workers), scripts/route43_share.py]. Cross-check: 12,800 on-Harbor boardings in 2015 (Central Harbor study via Streetsblog) x system trend x street-vs-corridor share ~ 8,400.

rapid.note: Route 543 per corridor doc; GTFS current = 12.8 mph / 20 min (sensitivity row)

visitor.note: Anaheim resort/visitor market: share of base boardings (pinned like tau); short trips (hotel-Disneyland-convention); random arrival (h/2 wait, no schedule adaptation)
